title: Sales & CRM
metaTitle: Free Sales CRM Software · Manage Clients & Pipeline · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Track clients, deals and follow-ups in one free CRM that flows straight into invoicing. Statements, credit limits, multi-currency, WhatsApp. Works worldwide.
keywords: sales crm, free crm, client management, sales pipeline, customer statements, lead tracking, crm with invoicing
heroTitle: Know every client, close every deal
heroSubtitle: A simple, fast CRM that keeps every customer, quote, invoice and conversation in one place, then turns relationships into revenue without leaving the workspace.
heroBullets: Clients, deals and history in one view

features.title: Unified client records
features.desc: Contacts, deals, documents and full payment history on one screen.

features.title: Sales pipeline
features.desc: Track leads from first quote to signed deal so nothing slips.

features.title: Follow-up reminders
features.desc: Never lose a hot lead, get nudged to chase quotes and renewals.

features.title: Customer statements
features.desc: One-click statements of account, sent by email or WhatsApp.

features.title: Credit control
features.desc: Set credit limits and terms per client and flag overdue balances.

features.title: WhatsApp built in
features.desc: Reach clients where they are, share quotes, invoices and statements.

sections.title: Every client conversation in context
sections.body: Stop digging through inboxes and spreadsheets. Each client record shows their quotes, invoices, payments and outstanding balance together, so anyone on your team can pick up a conversation and know exactly where it stands.
items: Notes and follow-ups your team can share

sections.title: Where relationships become revenue
sections.body: A CRM is only useful if it makes you money. Because Paper & Pen ties contacts directly to quotes, invoices and payments, your pipeline reflects real cash. Send a statement, set a credit limit, and convert an interested lead to a paid invoice without switching tools.
items: Credit limits and terms per client

faqs.a: Yes. Client management and the sales pipeline are part of the free-forever Sales & Invoicing module.

faqs.q: Does the CRM connect to invoicing?
faqs.a: Yes, directly. Every quote, invoice and payment is linked to the client record, so you always see the true relationship value and balance.

faqs.q: Can I set credit limits per client?
faqs.a: Yes. Define credit limits and payment terms per customer and get flagged when a balance goes overdue.

faqs.q: Can I message clients on WhatsApp?
faqs.a: Yes. Share quotes, invoices and statements over WhatsApp directly from the client record.

faqs.q: Does it support clients in different countries?
faqs.a: Yes. Manage a multi-currency client base and work in English, Arabic, Hindi, Bengali or Urdu.

ctaTitle: Put your clients in one place
ctaSub: Start free and bring every contact, quote and invoice into a single, fast CRM.
